lines.raw: Sally's first train ride | 萨莉第一次坐火车

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.chinese: 妈妈为什么感到难为情？
lines.raw: Why was the mother embarrassed? | 妈妈为什么感到难为情？

lines.english: Last week, my four-year-old daughter, Sally, was invited to a children's party.
lines.chinese: 上周，我四岁的女儿萨莉应邀参加了一个儿童聚会。
lines.raw: Last week, my four-year-old daughter, Sally, was invited to a children's party. | 上周，我四岁的女儿萨莉应邀参加了一个儿童聚会。

lines.english: I decided to take her by train.
lines.raw: I decided to take her by train. | 我决定带她坐火车去。

lines.english: Sally was very excited because she had never travelled on a train before.
lines.chinese: 萨莉非常兴奋，因为她以前从未坐过火车。
lines.raw: Sally was very excited because she had never travelled on a train before. | 萨莉非常兴奋，因为她以前从未坐过火车。

lines.english: She sat near the window and asked questions about everything she saw.
lines.chinese: 她坐在窗边，对看到的一切都问个不停。
lines.raw: She sat near the window and asked questions about everything she saw. | 她坐在窗边，对看到的一切都问个不停。

lines.english: Suddenly, a middle-age lady got on the train and sat opposite Sally.
lines.chinese: 突然，一位中年妇女上了火车，坐在萨莉对面。
lines.raw: Suddenly, a middle-age lady got on the train and sat opposite Sally. | 突然，一位中年妇女上了火车，坐在萨莉对面。
'Hello, little girl,' she said. | “你好，小姑娘。”她说。

lines.english: Sally did not answer, but looked at her curiously.
lines.chinese: 萨莉没有回答，只是好奇地看着她。
lines.raw: Sally did not answer, but looked at her curiously. | 萨莉没有回答，只是好奇地看着她。

lines.english: The lady was dressed in a blue coat and a large, funny hat.
lines.chinese: 那位女士穿着一件蓝色外套，戴着一顶又大又滑稽的帽子。
lines.raw: The lady was dressed in a blue coat and a large, funny hat. | 那位女士穿着一件蓝色外套，戴着一顶又大又滑稽的帽子。

lines.english: After the train had left the station, the lady opened her handbag and took out her powder compact.
lines.chinese: 火车离开车站后，那位女士打开手提包，拿出她的粉饼盒。
lines.raw: After the train had left the station, the lady opened her handbag and took out her powder compact. | 火车离开车站后，那位女士打开手提包，拿出她的粉饼盒。

lines.english: She then began to make up her face.
lines.raw: She then began to make up her face. | 然后她开始化妆。

lines.english: 'Why are you doing that?' Sally asked.
lines.chinese: “你为什么要那样做？”萨莉问道。
lines.raw: 'Why are you doing that?' Sally asked. | “你为什么要那样做？”萨莉问道。

lines.english: 'To make myself beautiful,' the lady answered.
lines.chinese: “为了让自己变漂亮。”那位女士回答。
lines.raw: 'To make myself beautiful,' the lady answered. | “为了让自己变漂亮。”那位女士回答。

lines.english: She put away her compact and smiled kindly.
lines.chinese: 她收起粉饼盒，和蔼地笑了笑。
lines.raw: She put away her compact and smiled kindly. | 她收起粉饼盒，和蔼地笑了笑。

lines.english: 'But you are still ugly,' Sally said.
lines.raw: 'But you are still ugly,' Sally said. | “但你还是很难看。”萨莉说。

lines.english: Sally was amused, but I was very embarrassed!
lines.chinese: 萨莉觉得很有趣，但我却感到非常难为情！
lines.raw: Sally was amused, but I was very embarrassed! | 萨莉觉得很有趣，但我却感到非常难为情！
